verses.roman: rākhē kuṭhēn n āsakti jiṅkuni man niḥspr̥h । tō naiṣkarmy mahā-siddhi pāvē sannyās sādhunī ॥
verses.summary: One whose mind is unattached, self-conquered, and free of craving attains, through renunciation, the supreme state beyond action.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: सिद्धीस लाभला ब्रह्म गांठी कोण्यापरी मग । ज्ञानाची थोर ती निष्ठा ऐक थोडयांत सांगतों
verses.roman: siddhīs lābhalā brahm gāṇṭhī kōṇyāparī mag । jñānācī thōr tī niṣṭhā aik thōḍayānt sāṅgatōṁ
verses.summary: Krishna says he'll briefly explain how the one who attains this perfection reaches Brahman—the highest state of knowledge.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: बुद्धि सात्विक जोडूनि धृतीचा दोर खेंचुनी । शब्दादि-स्पर्श टाळूनि राग-द्वेषांस जिंकुनी
verses.roman: buddhi sātvik jōḍūni dhr̥tīcā dōr khēñcunī । śabdādi-sparś ṭāḷūni rāga-dvēṣāṁs jiṅkunī
verses.summary: With a purified intellect, firm restraint, controlling the senses' objects, and conquering attraction and aversion,

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: चित्त वाचा तनू नेमी एकांतीं अल्प सेवुनी । गढला ध्यान-योगांत दृढ वैराग्य लेउनी
verses.roman: citt vācā tanū nēmī ēkāntīṁ alp sēvunī । gaḍhalā dhyāna-yōgānt dr̥ḍh vairāgy lēunī
verses.summary: living in solitude, eating little, restraining body, speech, and mind, absorbed in meditation with firm detachment,

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: बळ दर्प अहंकार काम क्रोध परिग्रह ममत्वासह सोडूनि शांतीनें ब्रह्म आकळी ।
verses.roman: baḷ darp ahaṅkār kām krōdh parigrah mamatvāsah sōḍūni śāntīnēm brahm ākaḷī ।
verses.summary: giving up egotism, force, pride, desire, anger, possessiveness, and ownership, one peacefully attains Brahman.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: ब्रह्म झाला प्रसन्नत्वें न करी शोक कामना । पावे माझी परा भक्ति देखे सर्वत्र साम्य जी
verses.roman: brahm jhālā prasannatvēn n karī śōk kāmanā । pāvē mājhī parā bhakti dēkhē sarvatr sāmy jī
verses.summary: Become Brahman and serene, free of grief and craving, seeing all as equal, one attains supreme devotion to Krishna.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: भक्तीनें तत्वतां जाणे कोण मी केवढा असे । ह्यापरी मज जाणूनि माझ्यांत मिसळे मग
verses.roman: bhaktīnēn tatvatāñ jāṇē kōṇ mī kēvaḍhā asē । hyāparī maj jāṇūni mājhyānt misaḷē mag
verses.summary: Through devotion one truly knows who and how great Krishna is, and so knowing, merges into him.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: करुनि हि सदा कर्में सगळीं मज सेवुनी । पावे माझ्या कृपेनें तो अवीट पद शाश्वत ॥
verses.roman: karuni hi sadā karmēṁ sagaḷīm maj sēvunī । pāvē mājhyā kr̥pēnēn tō avīṭ pad śāśvat ॥
verses.summary: Even while always performing all actions, taking refuge in Krishna, one attains by his grace the eternal imperishable state.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: मज मत्पर-वृत्तीनें सर्व कर्में समर्पुनी । समत्व न ढळूं देतां चित्त माझ्यांत ठेव तूं
verses.roman: maj matpara-vr̥ttīnēṁ sarv karmēṁ samarpunī । samatv n ḍhaḷūn dētāñ citt mājhyānt ṭhēv tūṁ
verses.summary: Krishna tells Arjuna to dedicate all actions to him, devoted to him, and keep his mind fixed on him through equanimity.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: मग सर्व भयें माझ्या कृपेनें तरशील तूं । मीपणें हें न मानूनि पावशील विनाश चि ।
verses.roman: mag sarv bhayēm mājhyā kr̥pēnēn taraśīl tūṁ । mīpaṇēṁ hēn n mānūni pāvaśīl vināś ci ।
verses.summary: By Krishna's grace one will overcome all difficulties; but heeding ego instead, one will perish.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: म्हणसी मनि झुंजे चि हें जें मीपण घेउनी । तो निश्चय तुझा व्यर्थ स्वभाव करवील चि
verses.roman: mhaṇasī mani jhuñjē ci hēñ jēm mīpaṇ ghēunī । tō niścay tujhā vyarth svabhāv karavīl ci
verses.summary: If out of ego you refuse to fight, your resolve is vain—your own nature will compel you.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: स्वभाव-सिद्ध कर्माने आपुल्या बाधिलास तूं । जें टाळूं पाहसी मोहें अवश्य करिशील तें ।
verses.roman: svabhāva-siddh karmānē āpulyā bādhilās tūṁ । jēṇ ṭāḷūm pāhasī mōhēṁ avaśy kariśīl tēṁ ।
verses.summary: Bound by your own innate karma, you'll inevitably do what you now seek to avoid out of delusion.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: राहिला सर्व भूतांच्या हृदयीं परमेश्वर । मायेनें चाळवी त्यांस जणूं यंत्रांत घालुनी
verses.roman: rāhilā sarv bhūtāñcyā hr̥dayīm paramēśvar । māyēnēñ cāḷavī tyāṁs jaṇūṁ yantrānt ghālunī
verses.summary: The Lord dwells in the hearts of all beings, spinning them by his maya as though mounted on a machine.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: त्यातें चि सर्व-भावें तूं जाई शरण पावसी । त्याच्या कृपा-बळें थोर शांतीचें स्थान शाश्वत ।
verses.roman: tyātēñ ci sarva-bhāvēn tūñ jāī śaraṇ pāvasī । tyācyā kr̥pā-baḷēn thōr śāntīcēṁ sthān śāśvat ।
verses.summary: Krishna tells Arjuna to take complete refuge in that Lord, by whose grace he'll reach eternal peace and supreme abode.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: असें गूढाहुनो गूढ बोलिलों ज्ञान मी तुज । ध्यानीं घेऊनि तें सारें स्वेच्छेनें योग्य तें करी ॥
verses.roman: asēṅ gūḍhāhunō gūḍh bōlilōñ jñān mī tuj । dhyānīṅ ghēūni tēṁ sārēṁ svēcchēnēṁ yōgy tēṅ karī ॥
verses.summary: Krishna says he has told this most secret knowledge; reflect on it fully and then act as you choose.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: सर्व गूढांतलें गूढ पुन्हां उत्तम वाक्य हें । हितार्थ सांगतों ऐक फार आवडसी मज
verses.roman: sarv gūḍhāntalēṅ gūḍh punhāṁ uttam vāky hēṁ । hitārth sāṅgatōṁ aik phār āvaḍasī maj
verses.summary: Krishna says he'll speak again his supreme, most secret word for Arjuna's good, because he loves him dearly.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: प्रेमानें ध्यास घेऊनि यजी मज नमी मज । प्रिय तूं मिळसी मातें प्रतिज्ञा जाण सत्य ही
verses.roman: prēmānēn dhyās ghēūni yajī maj namī maj । priy tūm miḷasī mātēm pratijñā jāṇ saty hī
verses.summary: Fix your mind on me, worship me, bow to me; you'll come to me—this I promise truly, for you are dear to me.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: सगळे धर्म सोड्नि एका शरण ये मज । जाळीन सर्व मी पापें तुझीं शोक करुं नको ॥
verses.roman: sagaḷē dharm sōḍni ēkā śaraṇ yē maj । jāḷīn sarv mī pāpēn tujhīṁ śōk karun nakō ॥
verses.summary: Abandon all duties and take refuge in me alone; I'll free you from all sins—do not grieve.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: न कथीं हें कधीं त्यास तपो-हीन अभक्त जो । श्रवणेच्छा नसे ज्यास माझा मत्सर जो करी ।
verses.roman: n kathīṁ hēṅ kadhīn tyās tapō-hīn abhakt jō । śravaṇēcchā nasē jyās mājhā matsar jō karī ।
verses.summary: This must never be told to one without austerity or devotion, who won't listen, or who envies Krishna.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: सांगेल गूज हें थोर माझ्या भक्त-गणांत जो । तो त्या परम भक्तीनें मिळेल मज निश्चित
verses.roman: sāṅgēl gūj hēn thōr mājhyā bhakta-gaṇānt jō । tō tyā param bhaktīnēm miḷēl maj niścit
verses.summary: Whoever teaches this supreme secret to my devotees will, through that highest devotion, surely come to me.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: कोणी अधिक त्याहूनि माझें पिय करी चि ना । जगीं आवडता कोणी न होय मज त्याहुनी
verses.roman: kōṇī adhik tyāhūni mājhēm piy karī ci nā । jagīṁ āvaḍatā kōṇī n hōy maj tyāhunī
verses.summary: No one does dearer service to me than such a person, and none on earth will be more beloved to me.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: हा धर्म-रूप संवाद जो अभ्यासील आमुचा । मी मानी मज तो पूजी ज्ञान-यज्ञ करूनियां
verses.roman: hā dharma-rūp saṁvād jō abhyāsīl āmucā । mī mānī maj tō pūjī jñāna-yajñ karūniyāṁ
verses.summary: Whoever studies this duty-filled dialogue of ours worships me with the sacrifice of knowledge, Krishna says.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: हें ऐकेल जो कोणी श्रद्धेनें द्वेष सोडुनी । पावेल कर्म-पूतांची तो हि निर्वेध सद्-गति ॥
verses.roman: hēṁ aikēl jō kōṇī śraddhēnēn dvēṣ sōḍunī । pāvēl karma-pūtāñcī tō hi nirvēdh sad-gati ॥
verses.summary: Even one who merely listens with faith, free of malice, will be liberated and reach the happy worlds of the righteous.

verses.speaker: श्री भगवान्
verses.text: तूं हें एकाग्र चित्तानें अर्जुना ऐकलेंस कीं । अज्ञान-रूप तो मोह गेला संपूर्ण कीं तुझा
verses.roman: tūṁ hēṁ ēkāgr cittānēṁ arjunā aikalēṁs kīṁ । ajñāna-rūp tō mōh gēlā sampūrṇ kīn tujhā
verses.summary: Krishna asks Arjuna whether he has listened with focused attention and whether his delusion born of ignorance is now destroyed.

verses.speaker: अर्जुन
verses.text: मोह मेला चि तो देवा कृपेनें स्मृति लाभली । झालों निःशंक मी आतां करीन म्हणसी तसें ॥
verses.roman: mōh mēlā ci tō dēvā kr̥pēnēṁ smr̥ti lābhalī । jhālōn niḥśaṅk mī ātāṅ karīn mhaṇasī tasēṁ ॥
verses.summary: Arjuna replies that his delusion is gone, memory regained by grace; freed of doubt, he'll do as Krishna says.

verses.speaker: संजय
verses.text: असा कृष्णार्जुनांचा हा झाला संवाद अदभुत । थोरांचा ऐकिला तो मी नाचवी रोम रोम जो
verses.roman: asā kr̥ṣṇārjunāñcā hā jhālā saṁvād adabhut । thōrāñcā aikilā tō mī nācavī rōm rōm jō
verses.summary: Sanjaya says he heard this wondrous dialogue of Krishna and Arjuna, which thrills him through and through.

verses.speaker: संजय
verses.text: व्यास-देवें कृपा केली थोर योग-रहस्य हें । मी योगेश्वर कृष्णाच्या मुखें प्रत्यक्ष ऐकिलें
verses.roman: vyāsa-dēvēṅ kr̥pā kēlī thōr yōga-rahasy hēṁ । mī yōgēśvar kr̥ṣṇācyā mukhēm pratyakṣ aikilēṁ
verses.summary: Sanjaya says by Vyasa's grace he directly heard this great secret of yoga from the mouth of Krishna, lord of yoga.

verses.speaker: संजय
verses.text: हा कृष्णार्जुन-संवाद राया अद्भुत पावन । आठवूनि मनीं फार हर्षतों हर्षतों चि मी
verses.roman: hā kr̥ṣṇārjuna-saṁvād rāyā adbhut pāvan । āṭhavūni manīm phār harṣatōṁ harṣatōñ ci mī
verses.summary: Sanjaya tells the king that recalling this wondrous, holy dialogue fills him with joy again and again.

verses.speaker: संजय
verses.text: स्मरुनि बहू तें रूप हरीचें अति अद्भुत । राया विस्मित होऊनि नाचतों नाचतों चि मी
verses.roman: smaruni bahū tēṁ rūp harīcēṁ ati adbhut । rāyā vismit hōūni nācatōn nācatōñ ci mī
verses.summary: Sanjaya says recalling Krishna's exceedingly marvelous form, he is amazed and rejoices over and over.

verses.speaker: संजय
verses.text: योगेश्वर जिथें कृष्ण जिथें पार्थ धनुर्धर । तिथें मी पाहतों नित्य धर्म श्री जय वैभव ॥
verses.roman: yōgēśvar jithēṅ kr̥ṣṇ jithēm pārth dhanurdhar । tithēm mī pāhatōn nity dharm śrī jay vaibhav ॥
verses.summary: Sanjaya concludes: where Krishna the lord of yoga and Arjuna the archer are, there are prosperity, victory, and lasting righteousness.
